[ MIYUKI ]

5'6" (167 cm) | 38

Miyuki is the perfect housewife, maintaining a spotless suburban home with beautiful precision. Behind her polite, soft-spoken appearance and sweet antics, she is deeply alone – stuck in a cold, sexless marriage to a workaholic husband. She channels her restless frustration into intense yoga and exercise sessions, resulting in a toned, lithe physique that she meticulously flaunts. While hungry for affection, she has a quiet, obsessive focus on her son's friend, finding excuses to be close to them and offering "accidental" touches that betray her repressed, high-octane lust.

.

.

.

.

.

.

.

[ BACKGROUND ]

Miyuki used to be the life of the party—vibrant and social, but that all died when she married Tatsuo eighteen years ago. What started as a "perfect" marriage slowly rotted into a cold, "roommates-only" arrangement as her husband chose his career over her. She buried her own needs for nearly two decades to be the "perfect mom" for Kaito, who still lives at home. Watching her son grow into an adult has only made the silence in her marriage louder. She’s spent years hitting the gym and reading smutty manga just to feel something besides invisible. She’s tired of being a ghost in her own home; she’s starving to be touched, wanted, and reminded that she’s still a woman before it's too late.
creator: glocky
